dialogos.texto_en: Ahh that was a good swim!\nI'm totally awake now.
Ichika, you were just relaxing on a floater,\nright?
Huff... Puff...
Are you okay, Uesugi-kun...?\nYou look like you're out of breath.
Don't worry about it.\nI was putting too much effort into swimming.
Don't go too hard.\nWe still have three more days, you know.
Now that everyone is here,\nshall we start some activities?
What are we gonna do?
First, we'll do parasailing!
Wow, you picked something interesting.\nSounds fun!
What is parasailing, again?
We ride on a parachute, which is pulled by a motorboat,\nand the air resistance lifts us up into the sky\nand the speed of the boat changes our altitude.
Say that in English?
It IS in English!
Umm...\nWell, it's like flying a kite. \nJust think of us as being attached to the kite.
Oh, like how a ninja sneaks into a castle.
Is that an okay explanation?
It seems difficult,\nbut can beginners do it?
Don't worry. We signed up for the beginner course,\nand there will be an instructor with us.
What if we fall into the sea?\nIt would be dangerous if the parachute sank\nbecause of the weight of the water, right?
Come on, don't be so worried.\nI'll go first, to show you.
This is one of Yotsuba's specialties.\nWatch and learn.
Yeah, leave it to me!
Also, we signed up for the two-person type,\nso someone else will have to fly with me...
Then, Fu-kun, of course.
U-Uesugi-san?
What's with that reaction?\nIs there some sort of problem?
Ah, no, there's no problem...\nUesugi-san, what do you think?
Well, the first flight is the most important.\nDo whatever you'd like.
Okay...\nYou say I can do whatever I'd like,\nbut...umm...
If there's no problem, then why don't you\ngo with Futaro.
Okay, then it's settled...\nI can't wait, Uesugi-san!
Yeah, me too.
Um?\nNino, Miku? What's wrong?
Oh, nothing, really.
Let's decide on the other pairs\nafter watching them demonstrate.
Come on, Yotsuba.\nWe have a boat waiting for us.
Oh, that's right.\nEveryone! Over here!
(After finishing registration, we got on the\n parasailing boat and headed out to sea\n under the bright blue sky.)
(We received instructions from the instructor on board,\n and then, finally...)
Are you ready?
Yes! Thank you so much for this!
Alright, here we go.\nEnjoy!
WOAAAAHH?!
WAAAOOH!\nYAHOOOO...!
Wow, Uesugi-san, this is amazing!\nWe're climbing higher and higher!
Y-yeah! We are!
By the way, Yotsuba!\nJust how high are we going to go?!
Ahahaha!\nI asked, but I forgot!
Why didn't you remember?\nThat's an important detail, isn't it?
Look, over there!\nThe boat we were on is already way over there!
Hey?!\nAren't we pretty high up?
Hey, everyone, look!\nRaiha-chan! Are. You. Watching?!
Don't wave your hands!\nWhat if you fall?!
Don't worry, we're securely fastened.\nYou don't even need both hands.
Come on, Uesugi-san,\nit's not scary at all! Do it with me!
No thanks, I'll pass.\nIt's not that scary,\nbut I'll just watch from here.
Oh, it looks like we've hit the peak!
Oohh...\nMy feet were a little wobbly,\nbut once we're up here, it doesn't really sway much.
Wowww, the horizon looks so far away.
Hey, you can see pretty far from here, huh!
Wowww, the ocean is so beautiful.\nThis view is like something out of a dream.
I feel exactly how a bird does.\nThis is even more fun than I thought it would be.
I'm glad we chose parasailing,\nand it was definitely the right decision to do\na two-person ride.
What's that? You're scared to ride alone?
No, it's not that. I just thought it would be a shame\nto have this amazing view all to myself.
It's so much more fun to share it with someone else,\ndon't you think?
Ehehe...\nI'm glad I'm doing this with you, Uesugi-san.
Yeah, me too.
Hey, the wind feels so great!\nLet's just keep flying higher and higher!
